reasoning:

A web search revealed a strong fundamental catalyst backing this mild bullishness: HST reported a 475% earnings beat ($0.23 EPS vs. $0.04 expected) on November 6 and raised its full-year EBITDAre guidance. JP Morgan also raised its price target from $17 to $18. This gives a short-term upward drift a slight edge above 0.50.

For the medium-to-long term, stocks generally revert to random-walk behavior, increasing uncertainty and driving probabilities closer to 0.50. Additionally, historical dividend schedules show Host Hotels typically goes ex-dividend in late December (e.g., $0.20 regular and $0.10 special dividend). Because the resolution criteria use unadjusted close prices, this structural price drop creates slightly more downside pressure for the February 2026 date relative to the November and December 2025 dates. Therefore, probabilities regress steadily toward 0.50 as the timeline extends.
